narrative:
No noncompliant items identified during this 2nd pre-license inspection for a Class A license. The inspection and exit 
briefing were conducted with the applicant. The direct non-compliance on the May 18, 2026 inspection report has been 
corrected.  
 
Each applicant for a license must demonstrate that his or her location(s) and any animals, facilities, vehicles, equipment, 
or other locations used or intended for use in the business comply with the Animal Welfare Act (AWA) and the regulations 
and standards. The purpose of this inspection is to help USDA ascertain your compliance with the AWA and regulations 
and standards. USDA conducted the inspection and exit briefing with the applicant. 
 
We will send a copy of your new license to you within 30 days, unless additional review is required. You do not need to 
take further action at this time. If you have not received your license within 30 days, please contact the USDA at 970-494-
7478. 
 
Conducting regulated activities prior to issuance of a valid USDA license is a violation of the Animal Welfare Act.
